decisions.decision: Cross-SOI scope: Phase 4 follows CONTEXT.md D-45, NOT ROADMAP Success Criterion #5
decisions.rationale: ROADMAP SC#5 ('select a target in another SOI, overriding D-12') contradicts the more-recent discuss-phase decision D-45 (targeting stays current-tier; D-12 preserved; true cross-SOI deferred to backlog 999.1). Operator chose to honor CONTEXT D-45. The world-pinned target circle (D-46) IS in scope. ROADMAP SC#5 should be amended to match the narrowed scope.
Confirmed tier-distance source, proximity-damp reshape, target coupling, and target-circle camera projection before planning.

ui-safety-gate fired on HUD/circle/marker keywords, but this is a Godot game HUD with the visual contract already locked in CONTEXT D-46. A gsd-ui-phase UI-SPEC (web design tokens/CSS) is the wrong tool. Operator chose skip-and-proceed.

next_action: Re-run /gsd-plan-phase 04. It reuses committed 04-RESEARCH.md + on-disk 04-PATTERNS.md. When prompted choose 'use existing research'; re-apply the two locked rulings (D-45 scope, skip UI-SPEC). Then it spawns the gsd-planner (opus) with CONTEXT + RESEARCH + PATTERNS.
context_notes: Research + pattern-map findings (HIGH confidence): NO new files - three existing files change. (1) FlightController.UpdateSpeedEnvelope (lines 380-449): change the clamp at line 434 from _maxSpeed to a per-tier ceiling = parent.SOIMeters * k (guard Root sentinel double.MaxValue with < double.MaxValue/2.0); keep BOTH lerps (_contextMax, _easedSpeed) running on every path (the one correct property of the reverted 260617-j6b fix); proximity damp stays symmetric, receding returns to tier ceiling not global max. (2) Add [Export] knobs TierSpeedFactor (k) and SpeedPerTarget (k') following the private-backing-field + System.Math.Max(0.0,value) setter pattern (lines 113-162). (3) Target coupling: Hud.ActiveTargetIndex thin getter calling existing private BuildTargetableList, returns targets[clamped].Index with -1 sentinel (no visibility change); FlightController + Hud resolve _hud/_worldRenderer via FindChild(name,true,false) as Type in _Ready (same idiom as _camera); use UniMath.Distance for target distance (NOT LocalPos arithmetic). (4) Target circle in Hud._Draw, gated on WorldRenderer.GetRenderPosition(idx, out pos)==true; reuse UpdateDirectionMarker's cameraLocal.Z>0 behind-camera guard + _camera.UnprojectPosition verbatim; QueueRedraw() in _Process. MEDIUM-confidence item to verify on first build: Godot 4.6 DrawArc/QueueRedraw API. Models: planner=opus, checker=sonnet. Verification of this phase needs an in-game Godot play-test (speed feel + SOI behavior not unit-testable).
